puzzle.title: The Supplicant of the Sanctuary
puzzle.intro: In the quiet hours of the night, a devoted soul called out to the Most Merciful within the hallowed walls of a sacred place. Years of unwavering faith and patience were about to be rewarded with a miracle that would bring joy and a legacy of prophethood.
clues: I spent my days and nights in devotion within a holy sanctuary, constantly supplicating to my Lord.
I grew old, and my wife was barren, yet I never lost hope in Allah's mercy.
I was granted a son, named Yahya, who became a prophet and a beacon of righteousness.
I was a prophet myself, sent to guide the Children of Israel.
I was a descendant of Prophet Harun and served as a priest in the Temple.
I was entrusted with the care of Maryam, the mother of Isa, and witnessed her miracles.

trial.label: Trial/Event
options: Bestowed a son in old age
Rescued from the belly of a fish
trial.answer: Bestowed a son in old age

location.label: Key Element
options: The Cave of the Seven Sleepers

outcome.label: Outcome
options: Granted a righteous son who became a prophet
Returned to their people after being saved from a fish
outcome.answer: Granted a righteous son who became a prophet

puzzle.arabic: وَزَكَرِيَّا وَيَحْيَىٰ وَعِيسَىٰ وَإِلْيَاسَ ۖ كُلٌّۭ مِّنَ ٱلصَّـٰلِحِينَ
puzzle.verse: And Zechariah and John and Jesus and Elias - and all were of the righteous. (6:85)
